title: FIX-IT BRIGADE - 211info
text: CENTER 50+ FIX-IT BRIGADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides volunteers to assist with short-term and one-time assistance with household needs. Services include changing light bulbs and filters; seasonal yard work; installing railings, locks, grab bars; building risers for chairs, sofas, and beds; minor caulking and weather stripping; and other minor home repairs. Provides referrals to businesses that offer senior discounts. Does not offer repairs on small appliances, electrical, wheelchair ramps, or rentals. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 50 and older that would benefit from services Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (503) 588-6303 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 588-6303 Program Coordinator Heidi Miller [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Applicants will be contacted to confirm qualifications and to schedule work. FEES: No cost for labor charges. $25 donation requested. All materials must be provided by the client or referring agency. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Salem TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Portland Road (Highway 99) at the intersection of Silverton Road, Highland Street, and Brooks Avenue in Northeast Salem. Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESPITE CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER 50+
